title: Auto Logout
description: A mod that automatically kicks yourself from server once a player gets in range of blocks that u set, allows u to afk farm and play safe.
body:
Ever wished you could stay safe on your favorite server even while AFK, farming, or mining deep underground?

AutoLogout has you covered.

This mod constantly monitors your surroundings and reacts instantly when another player enters your defined range. The moment someone gets too close, the mod can automatically log you out — or simply notify you, depending on your settings.

Whether you're:

AFK farming 
mining in dangerous areas 
or just playing it safe 

you stay one step ahead.
______________________________________________________________________________________________

 Features:
Fully customizable detection range (5 to 10,000 blocks)
Instant auto logout when a player is detected
Optional notification-only mode
Lightweight and fast (no performance impact)
Works quietly in the background
 Note:

This mod can also be used to detect nearby players use responsibly and respect server rules.

____________________________________________________________________________________________
